oraclePolicy.normative: Kanvas-owned fixtures, bundled deterministic fonts, versioned dumps, CPU oracle artifacts, route diagnostics, and GPU artifacts only when GPU support is claimed.
oraclePolicy.externalComparisons: Optional external comparisons are drift-only and cannot define pass/fail behavior.

driftLabels.purpose: Optional non-normative comparisons use drift labels to distinguish Kanvas-owned evidence from external-engine reference output.
driftLabels.driftLabelPolicy: Drift labels must appear in dump or report file names or top-level metadata. Drift reports must not define pass/fail behavior for Kanvas tests.

producer-only.description: Generated from deterministic sources; no golden comparison required.
producer-only.updatePolicy: Producer dump changes require focused test diffs and matrix checkpoint updates before any golden promotion.

golden-gated.description: Compared against checked-in golden artifact; golden mismatch fails the test.
golden-gated.updatePolicy: Golden changes require deterministic generator source, old/new diff in review, reason for rebaseline, and statement of whether behavior changed intentionally.
